text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We must have done a lot of walking today
because my throat is bone-dry as we head home. I
take out my water bottle to quench my thirst.
choice_data_list:
Plum kelp tea always tastes extra good when I
drink it outdoors.

Plum kelp tea always tastes extra good when I
drink it outdoors.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Trainer, have you been drinking that tea
regularly?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since Nishino Flower taught me that plum
kelp tea helps relieve fatigue, it's become a
favorite of mine.
choice_data_list: I have. It's been a lifesaver.
I have. It's been a lifesaver.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm so grateful for all the tidbits of wisdom
the neighborhood grannies taught me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, all kinds of stuff... I can show you if you
like?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we embark on Nishino Flower's
revitalization tour.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What do you think, Trainer? Doesn't gazing at
flowers while sunbathing just boost your spirits?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Really? Yay! All right, let's see what else we can
do to unwind...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: There! Let's go sit down on that bench!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and I look out at the flowers from
our seats.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... The fragrances of all those flowers are so soothing...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I-I fell asleep!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! It's already evening... L-let's move on to
the next spot!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, delicious... These dried persimmons are
nice and sweet...
choice_data_list: This flavor sure brings back memories.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It does for me too! One of the ladies in my
neighborhood used to eat them with me outside
the general store.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The nice clerk used to give us a few extra for free,
too...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, it wasn't all that long ago, now that I think
about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The homely, laid-back nature of Nishino Flower's
tour fills me with a sense of timeless nostalgia,
and I'm left thoroughly refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I think that's all we have time for today.
...How was my tour?
choice_data_list:
It was fantastic. Thank you for such a great day
out.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Thank goodness.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You see, um... I've always worried that I was
different.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The things I enjoy aren't quite like the hobbies of
everyone else my age...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... I love taking it easy and spending my time
peacefully.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
When I was younger, I really enjoyed simple
things, like feeling the warmth of the sun while on
a walk with a neighborhood granny.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The fact that I was able to share all those
experiences with you...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Makes me happy as can be!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. But I still have a long ways to go, seeing
how I fell asleep mid-tour and all...
choice_data_list: I feel bad not giving anything back.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer... Hehe! Thank you for saying so.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure I'll be able to show you even more
next time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I have to do my best for my considerate trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If things get any more relaxing than this, I think
I'll be the one falling asleep next time... Still, I'm
looking forward to her next tour.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What?! Don't be silly!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who's always doing everything to
support me... And I know I can be a handful at
times!
choice_data_list: I'd like to thank you properly sometime.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Umm... Then I'll have to come up with an even more impressive way to thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue to debate who should be thanking
whom the whole way home.
